title: Preserve sticky filter bar + footer action bar layout under virtualization
description: Virtualization happens inside #track-list. Surrounding sticky elements (#tracks-sticky filter bar at top, #action-bar at bottom) must continue to behave correctly. The container that scrolls is the list, not the page.
acceptanceCriteria: Sticky filter bar (#tracks-sticky position:sticky) still pins at top during scroll.
Action bar (#action-bar position:fixed bottom:0) still slides in on selection.
Mini player + audio probe banner are unaffected.
Verified in browser using playwright: sticky behavior intact, action bar fires on multi-select, no visual jank.
Vitest test covers AppState selection signaling -> action bar visibility transitions.

steps.details: Currently document/window scrolls. With virtualization, #track-list (or a wrapping #track-list-scroll element) must have overflow-y: auto + max-height to be the scroll source. Add the wrapper if needed.
If the scroll source changes (page -> container), #tracks-sticky's 'sticky' anchor must be relative to the container. Use position: sticky; top: 0 inside the container.
Per CLAUDE.md, IntersectionObserver on a sentinel div toggles .shadowed on the sticky bar. Sentinel must be inside the new scroll container.
Action bar is fixed to viewport (position: fixed) - unaffected by scroll container changes. Confirm body.has-action-bar still toggles correctly.
tests/e2e/qa-smoke.spec.ts: scroll #track-list; assert filter bar stays at top (boundingClientRect.top === 0); assert .shadowed class toggles.

technicalNotes: If page-level scroll is preserved (no inner scroll container), virtualization still works but the math uses window.scrollY + getBoundingClientRect for the track list. Slightly more complex; document the choice.
